changes.title: 50/50 Hybrid System
changes.description: New 50/50 power split between V6 turbocharged ICE and MGU-K (Motor Generator Unit - Kinetic). MGU-H removed.
changes.impact: Massive changes to fuel flow, turbo tech, and harvesting strategies

changes.title: Increased MGU-K Power
changes.description: MGU-K output increased to 160kW (from 120kW), deployable throughout the lap
changes.impact: Allows for lap-long assistance, improved acceleration efficiency

changes.title: Fuel Flow Increase
changes.description: Fuel flow limit raised to 40 kg/h to maintain performance with new power distribution
changes.impact: Sustains power output despite hybrid adjustments

changes.title: Active Aerodynamics
changes.description: Front wing and rear wing endplates can actively adjust mid-corner for drag reduction on straights

changes.title: Simplified Front Wing
changes.description: Fewer elements, simplified design to reduce downforce-generating complexity
changes.impact: Reduced drag but also reduced high-speed stability

changes.title: No DRS System
changes.description: Drag Reduction System completely removed. Active aero replaces all DRS functionality

changes.title: Sprint Format Extended
changes.description: Sprint now held on Saturday with 100km distance (increased from 100km), determines grid for main race
changes.impact: Three race days instead of two; strategic tire management crucial

changes.title: Penalty Reform
changes.description: Grid penalties now capped at 10 positions. Previously unlimited. Encourages more aggressive racing
changes.impact: Drivers less penalized for technical infractions

changes.title: Cost Cap Adjustment
changes.description: Cost cap reduced to $130M USD from $142M to improve competitive equity
changes.impact: Smaller budgets force harder technical prioritization

changes.title: Reduced Downforce
changes.description: Simplified rear wing and reduced floor area to reduce mechanical grip
changes.impact: Less downforce but also less tire wear
